query:

|-------|-------|---------|--------|

| #3939 | ADR-002: Combined Cap Priority | High — 3 options, outlier status, debug log consequence | ✓ Keep |
| #3946 | Lesson: AC-22 grep gate false positive | High — what/cause/takeaway, actionable fix | ✓ Keep |
| #3943 | Pattern: Per-guard negative tests | Good content, **empty tags** | Fix tags |
| #3937 | Pattern: NLI neutral-zone score | High — what/why/scope, confirmed by live data | ✓ Keep |
| #3938, #3941 | ADR-001 earlier versions | Deprecated in correction chain | ✓ Already handled |

One fix needed — #3943 is missing tags entirely. Patching that, then spawning the architect.
=== End recent conversation ===
